input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13
            TITLE: efficiency event

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13: EFFICIENCY EVENT
D.13 EFFICIENCY EVENT 
The Efficiency event evaluates the fuel/energy used to complete the Endurance event

final_answer: The Efficiency event evaluates the fuel/energy used to complete the Endurance event
